title: 0-1: Brahim
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(jsonld:articleBody) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
Morocco earned their first three points in the World Cup after defeating Scotland in Boston. Brahim started, played 83 minutes, and provided an assist for the second consecutive match. Just two minutes into the game, the madridista delivered a fantastic pass from midfield to Saibari, who scored the winning goal for his team.

With this victory, Morocco moves to second place in Group C, tied at 4 points with Brazil. The third and final group stage opponent for our forward will be Haiti, a match scheduled for Thursday the 25th, at 12:00 am, in Atlanta.
